/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/manet-routing-compare.dir/manet-routing-compare.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/examples/routing/ns3.45-manet-routing-compare-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-dsr-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-dsdv-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-aodv-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-olsr-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-flow-monitor-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mesh-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-wifi-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-energy-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-spectrum-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-propagation-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mobility-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-applications-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-apps-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
